world.title: Star Domain Portal
world.lock.clear_map: Clear the previous chân tinh in this star domain first.
world.lock.chapter_gate: Complete the previous chân tinh first.
world.barrier.name: Phong Giới Great Formation
world.barrier.hint_sense: Far above the star road, a pale ring stirs — rumor says Phong Giới seals the Inner Realm from what lies beyond.
world.barrier.hint_approach: The sealing boundary grows clearer. All chân tinh you have walked still lie within its curve; thunder-realm gates lead toward its edge.
world.barrier.hint_revealed: From Lôi Tiên Điện the Phong Giới Great Formation spans the horizon — the last shield of the Inner Realm before the Outer Exile.
world.barrier.phong_ton.title: Phong Tôn · Sealing Ancestor
world.barrier.phong_ton.intro: At the edge of the Inner Realm, ancient will still holds the boundary. Cultivators who reach Thunder Immortal Hall finally see who sealed the road.
world.barrier.phong_ton.beat01: Phong Tôn (封尊) raised the Phong Giới Great Formation to wall the Inner Realm — not to conquer, but to keep the Outer Realm's calamity from swallowing the stars within.
world.barrier.phong_ton.beat02: The formation rings every tinh vực you have crossed: Chu Tước, La Thiên, and the Lôi Tiên threshold. Beyond the shimmer lies Ngoại Giới — exile, void, and older grudges.
world.barrier.phong_ton.beat03: Wang Lin's road ends at Lôi Tiên Điện facing that seal. Perseverance brought you here; whether the boundary holds or breaks is the next ordeal of the Dao.
world.domain.noi_gioi: Inner Realm · sealed by Phong Giới Great Formation
world.domain.loi_tien: Lôi Tiên Realm · La Thiên Star Domain
chapter.01.fallen_village.name: Wang Family Village
chapter.01.fallen_village.desc: Ruined homeland on Chu Tước Star. Bare fists, humiliation, and the first breath of qi after Heng Yue Sect's rejection.
chapter.02.mist_forest.name: Ghost Spirit Mountain
chapter.02.mist_forest.desc: Mist-shrouded exile after the village fell. Spirit beasts test will, not talent — fortune hides in stone caves.
chapter.03.stone_canyon.name: Zhao Kingdom
chapter.03.stone_canyon.desc: Mortal roads and bandit hills beyond the mountain. Patrol guards and outlaws — dao or death on every pass.
chapter.04.moon_lake.name: Moon Lake Ruins
chapter.04.moon_lake.desc: Ancient seal beneath moonlit water. Corruption stirs where cultivators once bound a greater evil.
chapter.05.burning_desert.name: Fire Burn Country
chapter.05.burning_desert.desc: Scorching sand and demonic cultivators. Endurance tempered by heat — will, not luck, keeps you alive.
chapter.06.thunder_peaks.name: Heavenly Tribulation Pass
chapter.06.thunder_peaks.desc: Clouds gather for heavenly tribulation. Lightning recognizes the stubborn — heaven tests those who reverse fate.
chapter.07.frozen_palace.name: Ice Palace Ruins
chapter.07.frozen_palace.desc: Frozen halls hold echoes of past power. Memory traded for cultivation — cold dao on La Thiên Star.
chapter.08.abyss_rift.name: Inner Demon Pass
chapter.08.abyss_rift.desc: Heart demons and void within the Inner Realm — before the Lôi Tiên Gate. Heaven Reverse Pearl trembles; Phong Giới still shields you from the Outer Realm.
chapter.09.heavenly_gate.name: Lôi Tiên Gate
chapter.09.heavenly_gate.desc: Gate into Lôi Tiên Realm within the Inner Realm. Guardians test your heart — beyond lies Thunder Immortal Hall.
chapter.10.void_throne.name: Thunder Immortal Hall
chapter.10.void_throne.desc: Pinnacle of the Inner Realm on Wang Lin's road. Thunder Immortal Hall — beyond it lies only the Outer Realm, past Phong Giới.
map.fallen_village.01.name: Village Outskirts
map.fallen_village.01.desc: A vast cultivation star orbiting the ruined Wang homeland — ash paths, spirit pests, and quiet fields to walk and cultivate.
map.zone.village_west.name: West Ruins
map.zone.village_west.desc: Ash paths and collapsed walls — spirit pests and scavengers pick through what the fire left.
map.zone.village_east.name: East Fields
map.zone.village_east.desc: Quiet fields east of the village. Wild hounds prowl the furrows; looters haunt the tree line.
map.zone.village_north.name: Northern Ridge
map.zone.village_north.desc: Ridge overlooking Wang Family Village. Scavengers and stray hounds — peaceful walk turns dangerous at dusk.
map.zone.village_south.name: Southern Trail
map.zone.village_south.desc: Trail toward Heng Yue Sect. Spirit slimes thicken as the mountain gate draws near.
map.fallen_village.02.name: Heng Yue Gate
map.fallen_village.02.desc: Outer disciples and gate formations guard the sect trial. Defeat the jade guardian — the ancient sword sleeps here if fate allows.
map.mist_forest.01.name: Haunted Ridge
map.mist_forest.01.desc: Fog-choked ridge on Ghost Spirit Mountain. Mist spirits, ghost wolves, and spirit moths — danger thickens with every step.
map.mist_forest.02.name: Fortune Cave
map.mist_forest.02.desc: Stone cave where a fox spirit once watched from the fog. Shadow elite guards the path to the Ghost Spirit Beast — blade in seal if you missed it at the gate.
map.stone_canyon.01.name: Zhao Road
map.stone_canyon.01.desc: Zhao Kingdom patrol routes ambushed by mountain bandits. Farm here if your combat power still trembles.
map.stone_canyon.02.name: Bandit Mountain
map.stone_canyon.02.desc: Bandit stronghold on the high pass. The chief blocks the road to Moon Lake — ruthless choices ahead.
map.moon_lake.01.name: Moonlit Shore
map.moon_lake.02.name: Seal Ruins
map.burning_desert.01.name: Fire Border
map.burning_desert.02.name: Scorching Sands
map.thunder_peaks.01.name: Tribulation Clouds
map.thunder_peaks.02.name: Heavenly Thunder Altar
map.frozen_palace.01.name: Ice Palace Gate
map.frozen_palace.02.name: Memory Hall
map.abyss_rift.01.name: Demon Pass Edge
map.abyss_rift.02.name: Heart Demon Chasm
map.heavenly_gate.01.name: Lôi Tiên Steps
map.heavenly_gate.02.name: Lôi Tiên Trial Gate
map.void_throne.01.name: Hall Approach
map.void_throne.02.name: Thunder Immortal Hall
map.test.grove.name: Test Grove
map.intro.realm_cap: On this star you may cultivate to {realm} before the Dao demands a harder road. Higher realms — Second Step cultivators and beyond — lie far ahead.
